summary: Completed testing of DJ Withdrawal and Wallet functionality for DJ Booking Platform. Backend APIs (13 tests) all passed. Frontend withdrawal page loads correctly with all required features. Minor UI issue detected with button disabled state visualization.

ui_bugs.issue: Button should be visually disabled (grayed out) when balance < 50€, but appears with normal styling. The disabled functionality works correctly (modal doesn't appear), but visual feedback is missing.

action_items: Consider adding explicit visual styling for disabled button state on React Native Web (the disabled prop is working functionally but not visually)
critical_code_review_comments: IBAN validation implements ISO 7064 Mod 97-10 checksum correctly
Minimum withdrawal of 50€ is properly enforced on both frontend and backend
API returns proper wallet structure with pending_balance, available_balance, total_earned, total_withdrawn
The button has correct disabled logic but React Native Web may not render the disabled style correctly - consider using aria-disabled or explicit style override

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features work, minor visual issue with disabled button)

seed_data_creation: DJ test user created/used during testing with DJ profile
context_for_next_testing_agent: DJ withdrawal/wallet APIs fully tested. Test user has 0€ balance. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_withdrawal_wallet.py cover all main scenarios. Wallet page accessible at /dj/wallet, withdrawal at /dj/withdrawal.
